results.title: الذهب يهبط أكثر من 2% مع ارتفاع الدولار بفضل توقعات الفائدة
results.description: تراجعت أسعار الذهب، اليوم (الثلاثاء)، بأكثر من 2% بضغط من ارتفاع الدولار وسط توقعات برفع مجلس الاحتياطي الفيدرالي (البنك المركزي الأمريكي) أسعار الفائدة هذا العام في وقت يقيّم فيه المستثمرون المحادثات بين الولايات المتحدة وإيران.وتراجعت الأسهم العالمية وسط مخاوف بشأن تقييمات أسهم الشركات المرتبطة بالذكاء الاصطناعي، وفي ظل توقعات برفع أسعار الفائدة.وهبطت أسعار النفط الخام 1%، بينما استقر الدولار قرب أعلى مستوياته في عام، مما زاد من تكلفة الذهب على حائزي العملات الأخرى، وفقاً لوكالات إعلامية غربية.وانخفض الذهب في المعاملات الفورية 2.2% إلى 4099.84 دولار للأوقية، وتراجعت العقود الأمريكية الآجلة للذهب تسليم شهر أغسطس 2% إلى 4117.70 دولار.وقال كبير محللي السوق في شركة «كيه سي إم تريد» تيم واترر: «حظي الذهب ببعض الراحة بفضل انخفاض أسعار النفط هذا الأسبوع، لكنه لم يحظَ بنفس الدعم من الدولار، الذي يواصل ارتفاعه بسبب توقعات رفع أسعار الفائدة من قبل مجلس الاحتياطي الفيدرالي».ووفقاً لأداة «فيد ووتش» التابعة لمجموعة «سي إم إي»، يرى المتعاملون الآن احتمالاً 88% لرفع أسعار الفائدة في ديسمبر مقابل 61% قبل اجتماع مجلس الاحتياطي الأسبوع الماضي، ويتوقع المستثمرون سياسة تشديد نقدي في عهد كيفن وارش رئيس مجلس الاحتياطي الفيدرالي الجديد.وأكد رئيس بنك الاحتياطي الفيدرالي في شيكاجو أوستان جولسبي أنه مع استقرار سوق العمل، فإنه يركز على تحديد ما إذا كان التضخم المرتفع للغاية سيستمر على هذا النحو أم أنه سيتراجع مع تلاشي تأثير الرسوم الجمركية المرتفعة وإذا تم حل الصراع في الشرق الأوسط.
creator: «عكاظ» (جدة) @okaz_online

results.title: وداع بلا نقاط.. رباعي يخرج مبكراً من كأس العالم 2026
results.description: أسدل الستار على مشوار أربعة منتخبات في دور المجموعات من كأس العالم 2026، بعدما فقدت هايتي وتركيا وتونس والأردن آمالها رسميّاً في بلوغ دور الـ32 قبل الجولة الأخيرة.وعجزت المنتخبات الأربعة عن تحقيق أي نتيجة إيجابية خلال أول جولتين من البطولة، لتصبح ضمن أوائل المغادرين للمونديال، رغم الطموحات الكبيرة التي صاحبت مشاركتها قبل انطلاق المنافسات.وسجل الرباعي رقماً سلبياً لافتاً، بعدما ودّع البطولة دون حصد أي نقطة، ليجمع صفر نقطة من أصل 9 نقطة ممكنة، في واحدة من أضعف الحصائل الجماعية للمنتخبات المغادرة في تاريخ كأس العالم.وشهدت البطولة خروج الأردن وتونس مبكراً بعد خسارتين متتاليتين لكل منهما، فيما أخفقت تركيا وهايتي في مجاراة منافسيهما، لتتلاشى آمالهما في المنافسة على بطاقات التأهل.ومع استمرار منافسات دور المجموعات، تتجه الأنظار إلى المنتخبات الأخرى المهددة بالمغادرة، بينما تبدأ المنتخبات المتأهلة رحلة البحث عن المجد في الأدوار الإقصائية.
creator: رشيد الهاشمي (جدة) @rasheedalhashmi

results.title: From Abu Dhabi to Vienna, music builds bridges across cultures
results.description: From Abu Dhabi to Vienna, music builds bridges across cultures Staged on June 19 in the gardens of Vienna’s Schönbrunn Palace, the open-air event drew an audience of more than 60,000 people and was broadcast to millions of viewers worldwide. Tuesday 23/06/2026 Part of Vienna Philharmonic’s Summer Night Concert. VIENNA Abu Dhabi Festival has strengthened the UAE’s cultural presence on the international stage through a high-profile partnership with the Vienna Philharmonic’s celebrated Summer Night Concert, reinforcing the country’s growing role in fostering dialogue between cultures through the arts. Held under the founding patronage of Sheikh Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan, UAE Deputy Prime Minister, Minister of Foreign Affairs and Founding Honorary Patron of Abu Dhabi Festival, the Festival Abroad programme joined this year’s edition of the concert as an Artistic and Cultural Partner. Staged on June 19 in the gardens of Vienna’s Schönbrunn Palace, the open-air event drew an audience of more than 60,000 people and was broadcast to millions of viewers worldwide. Conducted by Lorenzo Viotti and featuring renowned Welsh baritone Sir Bryn Terfel, the annual concert is regarded as one of the largest classical music events in the world and is second only to the Vienna Philharmonic’s New Year’s Concert in global viewership. The collaboration reflects Abu Dhabi Music & Arts Foundation’s (ADMAF) long-term commitment to cultural diplomacy and international artistic exchange, using music as a platform to connect communities and encourage mutual understanding across borders. The partnership comes as Abu Dhabi continues to position itself as a global cultural hub, leveraging major artistic collaborations to project values of dialogue, tolerance and peaceful coexistence. For ADMAF, participation in one of Europe’s most prestigious musical gatherings represents more than sponsorship. It is part of a broader strategy to strengthen cultural engagement between the Arab world and leading international institutions while highlighting the UAE’s growing influence in global arts and culture. Founded in 1996, ADMAF has spent three decades building partnerships with major cultural organisations worldwide, promoting artistic innovation and creating opportunities for cross-cultural collaboration through the Abu Dhabi Festival and year-round educational initiatives. By aligning itself with landmark events such as the Vienna Philharmonic’s Summer Night Concert, the UAE is increasingly using culture as a tool of international engagement, demonstrating how artistic collaboration can transcend geography, language and politics.

results.title: Jardins d'Arménie at the Monte-Carlo Television Festival: A Story of Heritage, Told Globally
results.description: MONACO , June 23, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Jardins d'Arménie – Royal Brandy, the flagship brand of Pogossian Luxury Brand House, had its distinguished presence at the 2026 Monte-Carlo Television Festival as Crystal Partner, bringing Armenian heritage, craftsmanship and cultural excellence to one of Monaco's most prestigious international gatherings. Pogossian Luxury Brand House on 65th Monte-Carlo Television Festival The partnership marks a new chapter in the brand's growing presence in Monaco and reflects its commitment to building meaningful connections across the international cultural, hospitality and luxury sectors. "Monaco has long been a place where culture, creativity, and international perspectives come together. Being part of the Monte-Carlo Television Festival is a natural extension of the values that inspire Jardins d'Arménie. The Festival provides a unique platform to celebrate storytelling and cultural exchange while allowing us to share Armenia's heritage with an international audience and strengthen our presence in Monaco," mentioned Armen Pogossian, Օwner of Pogossian Luxury Brand House. Throughout the Festival, Armen Pogossian engaged with media representatives, partners, and invited guests, fostering meaningful dialogue around culture, creativity, and the story behind a brand rooted in authenticity, excellence, and the appreciation of time. Recognised as one of the world's leading television festivals, the Monte-Carlo Television Festival has, for 65 years, brought together acclaimed actors, producers, broadcasters, creators, and industry leaders in the Principality of Monaco. Major studios, networks, digital platforms and internationally renowned talent gather to compete for the prestigious Golden Nymph Awards. As part of the Festival, renowned chess grandmaster Levon Aronian, ambassador of Jardins d'Arménie, was also present in Monaco. Recognised as one of the leading figures in international chess, Aronian embodies values closely associated with the brand, including excellence, discipline and intellectual curiosity. "I was very happy to be present at the Festival in the company of so many accomplished people. I have always considered Armenian brandy, together with chess, to be among the symbols of our country, so I am proud to see these two worlds come together through Jardins d'Arménie. What impressed me most was seeing international guests discover something that felt genuinely different from what they were used to," said Levon Aronian, Ambassador of Jardins d'Arménie The Festival also welcomed a number of internationally recognised actors, actresses and industry professionals, including Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Ester Expósito, Kevin McKidd, David Morrissey, Lauren Cohan, David Boreanaz and Dame Kristin Scott Thomas, alongside renowned cinematographer Barry Markowitz, among others. The partnership with the Monte-Carlo Television Festival also coincided with the continued development of Jardins d'Arménie in Monaco through its collaboration with GCM (Grands Chais Monégasques), where the brand is now available. This growing presence reflects the House's ambition to build long-term relationships with collectors, connoisseurs and hospitality professionals who appreciate authenticity, heritage and exceptional craftsmanship. About Pogossian Luxury Brand House Since 1992, the Pogossian family has been creating exceptional luxury products. Present in more than 50 countries, the House embodies a vision rooted in craftsmanship, creativity and excellence, offering a discerning international clientele sophisticated and timeless experiences. Among its flagship brands owned by Armen Pogossian is Jardins d'Arménie – Royal Brandy. Produced in Armenia from Voskehat grapes and aged for 35 years through a distinctive multi-stage maturation process, the brand embodies a vision where cultural heritage and contemporary luxury meet. Combining traditional craftsmanship with contemporary presentation, Jardins d'Arménie offers a refined expression of Armenia's cultural and winemaking heritage. Armen Pogossian, Owner Pogossian Luxury Brand House

results.title: World Camel Day: How AlUla preserves the heritage of the ‘Ship of the Desert’
results.description: ALULA — From carrying Arabs across blistering deserts to providing sustenance through milk and warmth through wool, and even contributing to the economic growth of an entire nation, camels have been an integral part of life on the Arabian Peninsula for centuries. It is therefore only fitting that Saudi Arabia honors one of the most iconic animals in its culture and history on World Camel Day. Observed annually on June 22, World Camel Day highlights the deep connection between camels and AlUla, as well as the governorate’s efforts to preserve the heritage closely associated with the animal. **media[2726923]** Camels are deeply embedded in the Kingdom’s national identity, a reality reflected in the extensive support provided to the sector through specialized initiatives, events, and programs that support camel owners and ensure the sustainability of this heritage. In AlUla, rock carvings and inscriptions dating back thousands of years tell the story of the enduring relationship between humans and camels. Camels played a vital role in the prosperity of trade routes and transportation networks, making them an integral part of the region’s identity and development. **media[2726927]** As summer arrives, camels’ unique characteristics and remarkable ability to withstand extreme temperatures and adapt to harsh climatic conditions become particularly evident. These qualities have earned camels a special place in Arab heritage, inspiring the nickname, the “Ship of the Desert.” Camels in AlUla continue to receive significant care and attention, including support for camel owners and related activities. **media[2726926]** These animals have also established a prominent presence in AlUla’s cultural and sporting landscape through events and competitions inspired by local traditions. Foremost among them is the AlUla Camel Cup, recognized as the world’s largest annual camel racing championship. **media[2726924]** In addition, Mughayra Heritage Sports Village, AlUla’s premier destination for traditional sports, hosts a variety of programs and races that help revive this heritage, introduce it to visitors, and pass its values and knowledge on to future generations. **media[2726928]** Beyond sporting competitions, camels play a central role in many of the cultural events and heritage experiences hosted in AlUla. Today, camels have become a vibrant part of the region’s cultural and sporting scene and an integral element of the tourism experience offered by the Land of Civilizations.
creator: saudi gazette
